recommendations.title: Coup de Torchon
recommendations.overview: A pathetic police chief, humiliated by everyone around him, suddenly wants a clean slate in life, and resorts to drastic means to achieve it.

recommendations.title: The Big Easy
recommendations.overview: Remy McSwain is a New Orleans police lieutenant who investigates the murder of a local mobster. His investigation leads him to suspect that fellow members of the police force may be involved.

recommendations.title: 'Round Midnight

recommendations.title: The Judge and the Assassin

recommendations.title: Lone Star
recommendations.overview: When the skeleton of his murdered predecessor is found, Sheriff Sam Deeds unearths many other long-buried secrets in his Texas border town.
